chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 88 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 02.03.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Bilawal Bajeer, Advocate for applicant Mr. Muhammad Asif Shaikh, Advocate for Complainant Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, A.P.G. The offence under Section 489-F PPC although not bailable, carries a potential sentence of three years and thus falls within the non-prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C. Keeping in mind the principles enunciated in the case of Tariq Bashir & 5 others v. The State (PLD 1995 S.C. 34), I do not see any exceptional or extra-ordinary reason to deny bail to the applicant; secondly the applicant is in jail since last six months and by the time this case is heard he would have served out his sentence without being adjudicated guilty. Accordingly, he is admitted to post-arrest bail subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs. 1,00,000/- (One Lac) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
